subject: Mudbray, a small donkey-like Pokemon with brown and cream coloring, shown in a low crouching or rolling pose on muddy ground
description: Mudbray is depicted in a dynamic low pose — legs spread or tucked, body close to the ground — suggesting it is either rolling in mud or crouching in a charging stance. Its body is compact and rounded, covered in warm brown fur with a lighter cream patch on its muzzle and underside. Short upright ears and a small tuft of mane are visible at the top of its head. The ground beneath it is a rich brown, consistent with muddy or earthy terrain. The background is warm and diffuse, suggesting an open outdoor setting in daylight. The illustration captures the creature's stocky, low-to-the-ground physicality.
foreground: Mudbray in low crouching or rolling pose on muddy ground
background: warm diffuse light, earthy outdoor setting
emotion: energetic, physical, determined — low body posture suggests effort or play
